title: MelvinMon x Create
body:
This is just a Modpack for me and some Freinds to play Cobblemon our way. Including some mods that we added for quallaty of life and some cobblemon expentions. 

Chatch Pokemon and Build youre own Arena with the Decomods. Explore the world and Finde Legendarys and Shynies. Complete youre Pokedex and become the gratest Trainer. Battle NPCs with Strong Pokemon and build tacktiks to win all the Battles


Mods added : 
                        

Macaw's Bridges,
Macaw's Fances,
Macaw's Doors,
Macaw's Windows,
Macaw's Lights and Lamps,
Macaw's Furniture,
Macaw's Roofs,
held item Info,
AxiomTool,
FTB Backups 2,
Radical Trainer
Distant Horizons: A Level of Detail mod,
Mouse Tweaks,
cobblemon Spawn Notifications,
trinkets,
Cobblemon Megashowdown
